allow: Bash(powershell -Command "try { $p = python --version 2>&1; Write-Host ''Python:'' $p } catch { Write-Host ''Python: 없음'' }; try { $n = node --version 2>&1; Write-Host ''Node:'' $n } catch { Write-Host ''Node: 없음'' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object State; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object State")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, State; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, State")
